overridableConfigKeys.label: Color field
overridableConfigKeys.description: Field used to color-code points (blank = single color)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Drill event
overridableConfigKeys.description: Event emitted when the user clicks a data point

overridableConfigKeys.label: Chart height
overridableConfigKeys.description: Pixel height of the rendered scatter plot

overridableConfigKeys.label: Label field
overridableConfigKeys.description: Field used as the point label tooltip (blank = none)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Size field
overridableConfigKeys.description: Numeric field that scales bubble size (blank = uniform)

overridableConfigKeys.label: X-axis field
overridableConfigKeys.description: Entity field mapped to the horizontal axis

overridableConfigKeys.label: Y-axis field
overridableConfigKeys.description: Entity field mapped to the vertical axis
